query: Paris-Brest-Paris gran fondo cycling Rambouillet to Brest and back

videos.title: Paris Brest Paris 2019 - the 1200km long distance cycling "race" // LONG VERSION
videos.description:
On the 19th August 2019 at 5am I set off from Rambouillet, France on a 600km  journey to the city of Brest.. turned around and came back again.  This is my long form, unabridged version of events that took place during Paris Brest Paris 2019. Sadly I didn't get any footage at the various stops along the way as my GoPro remained on the handlebars throughout the journey.
Footage from the first ride of the ride is mostly missing too as there was a large smear/muck in the middle of the lens... I know... well done me!

// Strava: Part 1 - https://www.strava.com/activities/2642085512
// Strava: Part 2- https://www.strava.com/activities/2643155895
// Instagram: https://instagram.com/rikki.lake/
// Website: https://longdistancecyclist.co.uk/

videos.title: Paris Brest Paris 2019
videos.description:
12,000 metres of climbing, 1227km across Northern France, all this within 84 hours?! PBP takes place once every 4 years, thousands of cyclists from all over the world compete against the clock to travel from Paris to Brest and back within their chosen time limit.

In this video watch me take part in this epic randonneur, The French Ride, Paris Brest Paris.  Apologies for the sound quality in places, time was precious on this ride and often I would record the action straight from my handlebars rather than via wrist mount which allows me to you guys so much clearer.  I've added a few subtitles to support the bad audio - either way - I hope you all enjoy my epic ride in France.

If you love watching my videos and wish to show your support - join me now on Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/mraudax

Interesting Fact:

In this the 19th edition a german Hajo Eckstein went for the world record and completed the course in an amazing time of 43hours and 49minutes.

Strava - Part One: https://www.strava.com/activities/2642085512
Strava - Part Two: https://www.strava.com/activities/2643155895

- My Equipment -
Shiny Nuts!: https://amzn.to/3kYnLHf

Wahoo TICKR Heart Rate Monitor: https://amzn.to/3m0N0ce

- Nutrition -
HIGH5 Energy Hydration Drink (Caffeine) - https://amzn.to/361JhWn

Thanks for watching!

videos.title: PACKING FOR PARIS - BREST - PARIS
videos.description:
All ready to go now! You can dot watch us on this link (I think it just shows when we get to each control rather than a live tracker) 
 : https://www.paris-brest-paris.org/en/services/live-tracking/

I'm Y071 and Kyle is Y124 we start at 5.30am on Monday 21st August - wish us and our cod loins luck! 


Thank you so much for watching, if you can spare a second to hit subscribe with your pinky that would be awesome. 

^ Strava - https://www.strava.com/athletes/30216361
^ Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/amy.cycling...
^ Chai latte fund - https://www.buymeacoffee.com/amycyclingadven

If you're riding, enjoy it and stay safe x

The following brands support me and you will see their products in my videos, I'm beyond grateful & in disbelief that I get these opportunities! : 
SunGod - https://www.sungod.co/en-gb/road-cycl...
Exposure lights - https://www.exposure-use.com/Brands/E...
Garmin - https://www.garmin.com/en-GB/
Reserve - https://reservewheels.com/
Veloforte - https://veloforte.com/pages/about-us 
If you fancy trying the Veloforte snacks AMY-20 = 20% discount

videos.title: Controle Villaines la Juhel Paris Brest Paris  2023
videos.description: A quelques heures du départ, le contrôle de villaines la Juhel est prêt à recevoir les 6820 randonneurs qui s'élanceront de Rambouillet pour parcourir les 1200Km à vélo du Paris Brest Paris.

videos.title: Become a Randonneur. The Five Steps you need!
videos.description:
In this video, I will describe the five essential steps you need to follow to become a Randonneur. In addition, you will be able to follow Germaine through her journey to complete her first 200km brevet and become a Randonneur. 

All footage was captured on my hand held iPhone 12 and processed with the standard iPhone software.
videos.transcript:
